{{Transcript|event}}
{{Transcript list|Santa Claus|Goose|Paola|Bobby|Father Gnome|Elson|Saunders|Guss Mistletoad|Santa's scribe|GreatScott85|LazyLaura94|CharlieChimes06|JoyfulJudy02|Bernard (Christmas event)|Gnome inspector|WhoLouCindy57|MerryMax2000|Snowball champion|JacobM7|Barbarian bartender|Waiter}}

==The Festive Games==
===Attempting to enter the Christmas portal before starting the event===
* '''Santa:''' Ho Ho Hold your horses! You're not allowed in there.
* '''Player:''' Oh sorry... Also what's a horses?
* '''Santa:''' Never mind that, off you go. I've got to keep an eye on that dwarf at the back of the line.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Santa Claus===
* '''Santa:''' Hello there [player name]!
* '''Player:''' Merry Christmas Santa!
* '''Santa:''' A Merry Christmas to you too.
* '''Santa:''' I'm afraid I can't chat, got this line to keep an eye on.
* '''Player:''' Huh, normally Santa is the start of these events. I wonder who I should speak to?
* {{tact|end}}

===Petting the goose===
* '''Goose:'''  {{overhead|*HONK*}}
* {{trandom}}
* {{topt|Dialogue 1}}
** '''Player:''' ...Six Geese a-laying...
* {{topt|Dialogue 2}}
** '''Player:''' That's a loud honk.
* {{topt|Dialogue 3}}
** '''Player:''' Ha, HONK right back at you.
* {{topt|Dialogue 4}}
** '''Player:''' What would a goose want with a pub?
* {{topt|Dialogue 5}}
** {{tbox|Looking closer at the Goose's hat. It's got the name 'Wolfy' written on it.}}
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Paola===
* '''Player:''' Hey there.
* '''Paola:''' Hi hi.
* '''Paola:''' Can't talk too long. I've got to go fast.
* '''Player:''' Why do you need to go fast?
* '''Paola:''' Fast is better.
* '''Player:''' You might go a little faster if you put down that giant clock.
* '''Paola:''' Then how would I check the time?
* '''Player:''' That's a good point.
* '''Player:''' I don't think you'll be going anywhere at this rate. That goose hasn't moved an inch.
* '''Paola:''' Be patient [player name], geese always move and cause mischief. If not, I know what we can serve for dinner in the pub.
* '''Player:''' Oh my.
* '''Player:''' I'll leave you to it then! Good luck!
* '''Paola:''' You too!
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Bobby===
* '''Bobby:''' Hello there friend! I'm Bobby the gnome child.
* {{tselect|Select an Option}}
* {{topt|Heading into The Nutcracker?}}
** '''Player:''' Are you heading into The Nutcracker?
** '''Bobby:''' Oh yes. Me and Pa have been looking forward to this all year. Isn't that right Pa?
** '''Father Gnome:''' Yes Bobby. There's no doubt we will be sipping mulled pine inside The Nutcracker in no time.
** '''Player:''' Mulled pine? Sounds very... Organic.
** '''Father Gnome:''' It's delightful.
** '''Bobby:''' Wishing you happy holidays [player name].
** '''Player:''' You too Bobby.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|You're a gnome?}}
** '''Player:''' Woah, you're very big for a Gnome.
** '''Father Gnome:''' And you're very rude for a human.
** '''Father Gnome:''' Don't listen to them Bobby. You're just a little different.
** '''Bobby:''' Nice to meet you [player name]. Does somebody need a hug?
** {{tbox|Bobby stumbles and steps on his dad's foot while trying to hug you.}}
** '''Father Gnome:''' Son of a nutcracker!
** '''Bobby:''' Sorry Pa!
** '''Father Gnome:''' I'll walk it off.
** {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Elson===
* '''Player:''' Hello!
* '''Elson:''' Hello, what an exquisite day.
* '''Player:''' It's lovely round here.
* '''Elson:''' I simply can't wait to enter The Nutcracker.
* '''Elson:''' I've been training for quite some time.
* '''Player:''' Oh yeah?
* '''Elson:''' Indeed.
* '''Elson:''' In fact, I haven't slept for twelve days. HA.
* '''Player:''' A... are you okay?
* '''Elson:''' Better than ever!
* '''Player:''' Who's your little friend?
* '''Elson:''' This is Gizmo, a dear friend of mine.
* '''Player:''' What a lovely name, he sure is handsome.
* {{tcond|If the player has a [[monkeyspeak amulet]] or has completed [[Monkey Madness II]]:}}
** '''Gizmo:''' No u.
** {{tact|continue}}
* {{tcond|If the player does not have a [[monkeyspeak amulet]] and has not completed [[Monkey Madness II]]:}}
** '''Gizmo:''' Ooooo Ah Ah oooOOO.
** '''Player:''' What did he say?
** '''Elson:''' He said...
** '''Elson:''' Let me think here...
** '''Elson:''' Okay Oo is Aah, and OOO is oh...
** '''Elson:''' I think he just said hello.
** {{tact|continue}}
* '''Player:''' Oh he's awesome.
* '''Player:''' Before I go, I think I heard Santa saying you aren't allowed things on your back in the games.
* '''Elson:''' Don't worry about us [player name]. We are sneaky.
* '''Player:''' Good luck and Happy holidays!
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Saunders===
* '''Player:''' What's with the bucket on your head?
* '''Saunders:''' If I can't see my enemies, they can't see me.
* '''Player:''' Are you sure about that?
* '''Saunders:''' Don't doubt me stranger. This pub will be mine.
* '''Player:''' I hope you can flex your way to victory.
* '''Player:''' I think I heard Santa saying we aren't allowed things on your back in the games, by the way.
* '''Saunders:''' Does it look like I play by the rules?
* '''Player:''' Uh...
* '''Saunders:''' I make my own rules.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Guss Mistletoad===
* '''Guss Mistletoad:''' There's not much time left.
* '''Guss Mistletoad:''' Maybe I'll... No, stupid idea Guss!
* '''Guss Mistletoad:''' What am I going to do?
* '''Player:''' Are you okay?
* '''Guss Mistletoad:''' Hmm, I wonder... I could use a hand with something actually.
* '''Player:''' Oh yeah? What exactly do you need help with?
* '''Guss Mistletoad:''' You're willing to help? Great stuff.
* '''Player:''' I didn't say y-
* '''Guss Mistletoad:''' The name is Guss, Guss Mistletoad. You see that portal over there?
* '''Player:''' I see it.
* '''Guss Mistletoad:''' That's the portal to The Nutcracker pub. It's been a dream of mine to get inside.
* '''Player:''' I've never seen this portal or heard of this pub before.
* '''Player:''' Why don't you just walk in?
* '''Guss Mistletoad:''' Poor innocent [player name], you can't just do that! It's Santa's prized pub, only a select few can enter.
* '''Player:''' So what exactly are the criteria for entry?
* '''Guss Mistletoad:''' You have to win the Festive Games of course. It's a series of games to determine who is the most festive in the land.
* '''Player:''' So you're familiar with these games?
* '''Guss Mistletoad:''' Yes! But I'm not good at them. I can never get past the final. That's where I'm hoping you can help! Let's rig it.
* '''Player:''' By 'rig the games' you mean I carry you through them?
* '''Guss Mistletoad:''' Absolutely.
* '''Guss Mistletoad:''' Shall we begin?
* {{tselect|Start the Christmas event?}}
* {{topt|Yes}}
** '''Player:''' Sure, as long as you'll bring me some beer from the pub when you win.
** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' If there's any left after I'm done!
** {{tselect|Select an Option}}
** {{topt|How do we enter the games?}}
*** '''Player:''' How do we enter these games then?
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' First off we need to nab ourselves some game times from Santa.
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' You've got to do this [player name], but be very vague as to why you need two entry times.
*** '''Player:''' Why do I need to be vague?
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' As I mentioned before, I've taken part in these games many times before. Failing every single time.
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' Let's say I'm not exactly on the nice list at the moment.
*** '''Player:''' I'll do my best.
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' Thanks [player name], I'm so excited for an all-I-can- drink beer-fest.
*** {{tact|other}}
** {{topt|Where did you come from?}}
*** '''Player:''' Tell me a bit about yourself, Guss.
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' What a lovely person you are [player name]! I do love a backstory!
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' Let's paint a picture for you...
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' It was a frosty morning in the month of Bennath, around twenty one years go...
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' I'd just left my friend Doric's house after 'borrowing' some ore to take back to the mines.
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' Off to work I go.. Hi ho, h-
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' No that's not right.
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' Anyway, I went to work and as you can probably tell, I work in the Dwarven Mines.
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' One day I got really thirsty, I hadn't consumed an alcoholic beverage in over five minutes.
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' I was getting reckless.
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' So I went out in search of the nearest pub.
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' For some unknown reason I saw this portal, same as you see it today.
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' It's the middle of Bennath, why does it look so Christmassy? I thought to myself.
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' Turns out there'd been a mix up...
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' Long story short, I got chatting to Santa and he told me about the games and the amazing Nutcracker pub.
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' From that day on I was determined to gain access to this pub!
*** '''Player:''' So in a nutshell, you got thirsty and wanted to go to a pub?
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' Yup.
*** '''Player:''' You know there is a pub just south-west of here? In Falador?
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' Oh, there's one finite detail I missed out.
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' The Nutcracker has a FREE BAR!
*** '''Player:''' Of course it has.
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' Some of the folk passing through felt a bit sorry for me after all these years, so they made me this cool jumper and hat to keep me warm.
*** '''Player:''' They do look great.
*** {{tact|other}}
** {{topt|Can you tell me about the games?}}
*** '''Player:''' So you've done these games before Guss?
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' That's correct, yeah.
*** '''Player:''' This will be easy then. You can just tell me how to win each game.
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' Annoyingly, the games change every year.
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' But I can tell you what I know.
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' Santa runs these games like a tournament. You win one, you move onto the next game.
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' There are two games total, and then the final!
*** '''Player:''' What were the games like before? Were they hard?
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' For a small dwarf like me, the hardest thing I've ever played.
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' But for you it'll be a piece of cake!
*** '''Player:''' Well, I hope so.
*** {{tact|other}}
** {{topt|Goodbye.}}
*** '''Player:''' I better be off.
*** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' Bye [player name]!
*** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|No}}
** '''Player:''' I might need some time to think about it.
** '''Guss Mistletoad:''' Okay, come back if you change your mind!
** {{tact|end}}

===Attempting to enter the Christmas portal or talking to Santa after starting the event===
* '''Santa:''' Well hello there [player name].
* '''Player:''' Hello.
* '''Santa:''' What can I do for you on this fine winter day?
* '''Player:''' I was hoping to enter into your festive games!
* '''Santa:''' Ah, splendid! Another contender.
* '''Santa:''' Now I must warn you, the games will put you to the test. They may even break you.
* '''Santa:''' Failing the games will put you on the Naughty List until the end of time.
* '''Santa:''' Do you accept these conditions?
* '''Player:''' Uh... I guess so.
* '''Santa:''' Excellent!
* {{tbox|Santa tells you your game time.}}
* '''Player:''' Thanks! Can I also ask a favour?
* '''Santa:''' It depends, have you been nice this year?
* '''Player:''' Absolutely.
* '''Santa:''' Very well, I trust you. What do you desire?
* {{tcond|If the player is on a [[free-to-play]] world:}}
** '''Player:''' A Gilded Scimitar.
* {{tcond|If the player is on a [[members]] world:}}
** '''Player:''' A Twisted Bow.
* '''Player:''' Wait no... Sorry ignore that. Instinct kicked in.
* '''Player:''' Could I get another entry time? My friend has been caught up re-homing lost kittens and would love a chance to enter the games.
* '''Santa:''' What a delightful friend you have there. Of course.
* {{tbox|Santa tells you Guss' game time.}}
* '''Player:''' My time and my friend's time are different?
* '''Santa:''' That's the rules I'm afraid, we can't have any funny business going on.
* '''Player:''' Oh uh... Fair enough.
* {{tact|end}}

===Attempting to enter the Christmas portal or talking to Santa again after getting the game times===
* '''Santa:''' Your game time is coming up, better get ready!
* '''Player:''' I'll be back in a jiffy. I just need to chat to my... friend.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Guss after getting his game time===
* '''Player:''' Right, I've got two times for us.
* '''Guss Mistletoad:''' Amazing, Santa didn't suspect a thing?
* '''Player:''' No, but you may have to re-home a few kittens.
* '''Guss Mistletoad:''' Uhhh, I'm not s-
* '''Player:''' But that's not important right now.
* '''Player:''' Actually, there is a bit of a snag. Our times are different for entering the games.
* '''Guss Mistletoad:''' Oh no, this can't be happening. That puts a right spanner in the works.
* '''Player:''' Well, by the sounds of it you said it's a tournament format right?
* '''Guss Mistletoad:''' I did say that, yes.
* '''Player:''' So maybe everyone gets pulled in for one big final?
* '''Guss Mistletoad:''' Of course! How silly of me, you'd have thought I would remember that after twenty one years of playing these games.
* '''Player:''' 21...
* '''Player:''' How confident are you in getting to the final?
* '''Guss Mistletoad:''' Oh it's impossible for me.
* '''Player:''' What?!
* '''Guss Mistletoad:''' Silly [player name], I'll cheat of course. I gave up my festive games morals long ago.
* '''Player:''' Suit yourself.
* '''Player:''' Looks like my time is first, so I'll hopefully see you in the final!
* '''Guss Mistletoad:''' Good luck [player name] I've got snow doubts you'll do great!
* '''Player:''' Did you just-
* '''Guss Mistletoad:''' Until we meet again!
* {{tact|end}}
